labno2 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Reading files with labno2

Package index

All functions

extract_id()
Extract an identifier using regex
extract_igene_rno()
Extract iGene R number from a character string
extract_labno()
Extract lab number from a string
extract_suffix()
Extract a sample replicate suffix from a string
extract_worksheet()
Extract worksheet from a character string
join_clc_msi_locus_tables()
Join information in CLC MSI Report locus section
mutate_clc_msi_row_numbers()
Add row numbers to the locus table section of a CLC MSI Report
mutate_filename()
Add filename and filepath to a dataframe
mutate_ids()
Add sample identifiers from filename as additional data columns
read_clc_msi_locus_section()
Read the section of a CLC MSI Report Excel which contains locus lengths
read_csv_with_filename()
Read a csv file and add the filename as a column
read_excel_with_filename()
Read an Excel file with additional columns for filename
read_json_with_filename()
Read a table from a JSON file as a dataframe
read_vcf_with_filename()
Read a VCF file into R as a data frame
regex_ids()
Regular expressions for sample identifiers
tidy_clc_msi_locus_tables()
Title
